content.en:
"Origin Rule Robbery?"

As soon as Lingze River Ancestor heard this treasure, his expression suddenly changed, and he immediately said helplessly: "This lord, where do we have the Origin Rule Robbery Crystal! The Origin Rule Robbery Crystal is too precious, our Jinyang River Palace has not grabbed a Origin Rule Robbery Crystal in the Dark Forbidden Domain, in its own foreign world, the strength is not strong, and it can't rob others, once robbed an Origin Rule Robbery Crystal, but an accidental news leaked, we immediately refined it, lest it be snatched away by other powerful forces." "

"A force like our Jinyang River Palace is too weak, there is not even a second-level Supreme River Ancestor, it may be destroyed at any time, where can there be a Origin Rule Robbery Crystal!"

"There is no Origin Rule to rob the crystal?" Ye Tian was a little disappointed.

He roughly judged that Lingze River Ancestor was not lying, so he did not plan to trade the Origin Rule Robbery Crystal.

"Since you don't have the Origin Rules to rob the crystal, then trade some resources, if you dare to refuse, then your base will not want to exist, and this gate will also be destroyed by me!" Ye Tian threatened.

In the face of Ye Tian's threat, Lingze River Ancestor naturally did not dare to refuse, so he agreed to the transaction.

So, Ye Tian took out a lot of resources and treasures, and asked Lingze River Ancestor to mobilize resources from his base camp, if the resources were not sent, Lingze River Ancestor would not want to leave.

Of course, Ye Tian will not trade at the same price, basically one resource trades ten resources, otherwise how can it be called a catastrophe transaction.

Soon, countless resources were sent from Jinyang River Palace, and the deal with Ye Tian was completed.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian left the Jinyang River Forbidden Land and continued to other forbidden places.

After Ye Tian left, Lingze River Ancestor muttered: "Last Great Tribulation, the Dark Forbidden Domain had not yet given birth to a Supreme Ancestor, and now this Great Tribulation has not yet arrived, and a third-level Supreme Ancestor suddenly appeared, how did he do it?"

If you want to become a Supreme Ancestor, you must fuse the Ancestor Law, so you must go to other foreign worlds to create the Ancestor Law, or obtain the origin rules of other foreign worlds to rob the crystal, so as to use the origin rules to rob the crystal and comprehend the rules of the foreign world, so as to create the ancestor law that fits the rules of the foreign world.

Therefore, it was absolutely impossible for Ye Tian to become the Supreme Ancestor on his own.

Obviously, there is someone behind Ye Tian, or there is a powerful force.

"To be able to easily create a third-level supreme ancestor, are those six super-name-level forces, or are there even more powerful forces interfering in the Dark Forbidden Domain?"

Lingze Hezu conjecture.

However, this matter has nothing to do with him, Jinyang River Palace is too weak, and he doesn't want to participate in anything.

Then, he also returned to the Jinyang River Palace.

In the following days, Ye Tian continued to go to forbidden places one by one, specifically to find those weak forces to trade.

For Ye Tian's arrival, these forces did not dare to resist at all.

After trading with these forces, Ye Tian obtained a large amount of Exotic Heaven and Earth resources, which were not only helpful to him, but also to the Terran Ancestors, who could help them reach the top Ancestor level faster.

After many transactions, Ye Tian finally traded two Origin Rule Robbery Crystals, replacing the two Origin Rule Robbery Crystals in his hand.

After obtaining two new Origin Rule Tribulation Crystals, Ye Tian re-entered the retreat cultivation and comprehended the Creation of the Supreme Ancestral Technique.

I have to say that after obtaining the new Origin Rule Crystal Robbery, Ye Tian's speed of fusing the Ultimate Ancestral Technique was extremely fast, but he was still affected by some influences, and it was not as fast as the first time he used the Origin Rule Crystal Robbery Comprehension to create the Supreme Ancestral Technique.

The thirteenth Supreme Ancestral Technique, it took Ye Tian two realms to create success, and this speed was not too fast.

The fourteenth Supreme Ancestral Technique, Ye Tian spent six realm epochs to create success.

And in order to create the fifteenth Supreme Ancestral Technique, Ye Tian spent twenty realm eras.

Subsequently, he spent the sixteenth Supreme Ancestral Technique, and it took sixty realm eras.

At this point, he changed to another Origin Rule Tribulation Crystal for enlightenment and creation.

As a result, it took him three realm epochs to create the seventeenth Supreme Ancestral Technique, and it was obvious that the difficulty of creating fusion had increased again.

Before I knew it, the Dark Forbidden Realm had passed the eighth Dark Calendar, and there was only one Dark Calendar left.

And Ye Tian created a total of nineteen Supreme Ancestral Techniques, and his strength was extremely terrifying, far surpassing the third level of ordinary Supreme Ancestral Techniques.

Now, Ye Tian found that every time he created a supreme ancestral technique, his strength increase was very weak and weak.

Unless he finds a way to break through to become an invincible ancestor, it will be impossible for his strength to increase significantly!

However, how to become an invincible ancestor, he didn't know, and I'm afraid that many Supreme Third Level powerhouses didn't know either.

In addition, it is more difficult to become an invincible ancestor than to become a supreme ancestor.

He had threatened some nameless forces before, wanting to know how to attack the secrets of the Invincible Ancestor, but none of them knew.

Therefore, he didn't want to attack the Invincible Ancestor for the time being.

"There is still a dark time, even if you go to trade the Origin Rule Robbery Crystal, it will be difficult to create a few supreme ancestral skills, and you will not be able to improve your strength. It's better to help your family create an ancestral method that fits the rules of the Exotic Heaven and Earth, and then teach it to them, and help them impact the Supreme Ancestor!" Ye Tian thought to himself.

That's right, after understanding, Ye Tian now knows that becoming a Supreme Ancestor does not mean creating the Exotic Ancestor Law by himself, just like becoming an Ancestor, he can fuse the Ownerless Ancestor Method.

It's the same with becoming a Supreme Ancestor, if you get the two Ancestral Techniques of a fallen Supreme Ancestor, you can fuse these two Ancestral Methods and impact the Supreme Ancestor.

Even because of the experience of the Supreme Ancestor, the difficulty of fusing to become the Supreme Ancestor is lower.

For example, most of those nameless forces were accidents or the treasures and inheritances of the fallen Supreme Ancestor, and they became the Supreme Ancestor by luck.

Otherwise, many nameless forces are too weak, and they can't grab the Origin Rule Tribulation Crystal, and they can only stay in the Exotic Heaven and Earth Tribulation for one realm year, where can they create the Ancestor Law in such a little time!

Therefore, inheriting the two ancestral methods of the fallen Supreme Ancestor has a certain chance of becoming the Supreme Ancestor.

It is a certain chance, not an inevitability, if the Ancestral Law is not in good agreement with itself, then the chance of success is not great.

In addition, the strongest ancestor who became in this way is very weak, and it is not as good as the strongest ancestor who relies on his own achievements, but no matter how weak the strongest ancestor is, he is also the strongest ancestor.
